articles.author: Frank  Andrews
articles.title: 3 evacuated from hantavirus cruise ship as Spain says it will dock in Canary Islands despite local opposition - CBS News
articles.description: Three passengers have been evacuated from a cruise ship hit by a hantavirus outbreak, as related cases are confirmed in Switzerland and South Africa.
articles.content: Three patients suspected of having the hantavirus were evacuated from the MV Hondius cruise ship and were on their way to the Netherlands for medical care, the World Health Organization said Wednesda… [+8857 chars]
